Home > Docs > Overview

Documentation

Welcome to our documentation. This page has some information about our product.

Quick Start

To get started, install the package and run it. You will need Node.js 18 or higher. Run npm install mypackage and then run npx mypackage init to set things up.

Features

Our product has many features. It is fast. It is reliable. It works on all platforms. We support Windows, Mac, and Linux.
Configuration
You can configure the tool by editing the config file. Set the options you want and restart the application.
API
The API accepts JSON requests. Send a POST to /api/v1/data with your payload. The response will be JSON. Authentication is via Bearer token.
